title: agrostis muscosa
intro: Agrostis muscosa, also known as musky wood grass or musky bentgrass, is a type of plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea or used in a salve, with its leaves and stems typically being harvested for medicinal use.
